AppointmentDate.title: AppointmentDate
AppointmentDate.description: The scheduled start date and time of the medical appointment.

DoctorName.title: DoctorName
DoctorName.description: The name of the healthcare professional (Service Resource) assigned to the appointment.

HospitalName.title: HospitalName
HospitalName.description: The name of the hospital or service territory where the appointment is located.

PatientName.title: PatientName
PatientName.description: The full name of the patient (Account) associated with the appointment.

ServiceAppointmentNumber.title: ServiceAppointmentNumber
ServiceAppointmentNumber.description: The unique identification number for the service appointment (e.g., SA-0044).

ServiceAppointmentStatus.title: ServiceAppointmentStatus
ServiceAppointmentStatus.description: The current lifecycle stage of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed).

WorkType.title: WorkType
WorkType.description: The specific type of medical procedure or consultation (e.g., Knee Surgery).
